name: testautomation-web
description: Single-page app + Cypress JavaScript automation framework

scripts.instrument: shx rm -rf app-instrumented && shx cp -r app app-instrumented && nyc instrument app/js app-instrumented/js
scripts.test: npm run instrument && shx rm -rf cypress-tests/.nyc_output && (start-server-and-test start:app http://localhost:8080 'cypress run --project cypress-tests'; TESTS_EXIT=$?; nyc report; exit $TESTS_EXIT)
scripts.test:chrome: npm run instrument && shx rm -rf cypress-tests/.nyc_output && (start-server-and-test start:app http://localhost:8080 'cypress run --project cypress-tests --browser chrome'; TESTS_EXIT=$?; nyc report; exit $TESTS_EXIT)
scripts.test:firefox: npm run instrument && shx rm -rf cypress-tests/.nyc_output && (start-server-and-test start:app http://localhost:8080 'cypress run --project cypress-tests --browser firefox'; TESTS_EXIT=$?; nyc report; exit $TESTS_EXIT)
scripts.test:spec: npm run instrument && shx rm -rf cypress-tests/.nyc_output && (start-server-and-test start:app http://localhost:8080 'cypress run --project cypress-tests --spec $SPEC'; TESTS_EXIT=$?; nyc report; exit $TESTS_EXIT)
scripts.test:open: npm run instrument && shx rm -rf cypress-tests/.nyc_output && start-server-and-test start:app http://localhost:8080 'cypress open --project cypress-tests'
